<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update API key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/api-keys/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



    Update an existing API key in the Account.

    ### Permissions
    * `api-key:write`
